items.caption: Donald Duck's nephews playing with a hypnosis gun. One nephew says "YOU'RE A DOG!" and another responds "BOW, WOW, WOW, WOW, WOW!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck's nephews playing with a hypnosis gun. One nephew says "YOU'RE A DOG!" and another responds "BOW, WOW, WOW, WOW, WOW!"](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_2_v2.jpg)

items.caption: A nephew points the gun at another and says "BING! YOU'RE UNHYPNOTIZED!" while Donald watches from a chair.
items.md: ![A nephew points the gun at another and says "BING! YOU'RE UNHYPNOTIZED!" while Donald watches from a chair.](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)

items.caption: A nephew points the gun at Dewey and says "BING! YOU'RE HYPNOTIZED, DEWEY!"
items.md: ![A nephew points the gun at Dewey and says "BING! YOU'RE HYPNOTIZED, DEWEY!"](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_3_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Dewey acts like a cat, saying "MEOW! MEOW! MEOW!" after being told "YOU'RE A CAT!"
items.md: ![Dewey acts like a cat, saying "MEOW! MEOW! MEOW!" after being told "YOU'RE A CAT!"](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_5_v2.jpg)

items.caption: A nephew points the gun at Donald and says "BING! YOU'RE UNHYPNOTIZED!"
items.md: ![A nephew points the gun at Donald and says "BING! YOU'RE UNHYPNOTIZED!"](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_4_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald reaches for the gun, saying "OH, NO, YOU DON'T! GIVE ME THAT GUN!" while a nephew says "NOW YOU HYPNOTIZE ME, DEWEY!"
items.md: ![Donald reaches for the gun, saying "OH, NO, YOU DON'T! GIVE ME THAT GUN!" while a nephew says "NOW YOU HYPNOTIZE ME, DEWEY!"](CBatAotCB-074_page_1_image_6_v2.jpg)
From *Walt Disney's Comics* No. 145, October 1952; © 1952 Walt Disney Productions.

items.value: intractable deadbeat, Rockjaw Bumrisk. Donald tries to hypnotize Bumrisk with no success, and finally Rockjaw turns the gun on Donald. Once again Donald goes under—first as a gopher ("Cherk! Cherk! I keep thinking

items.md: that I have to collect a dollar from this guy! But how can I when I'm only a gopher?"), then a chicken. Then Bumrisk hypnotizes Donald into thinking that he's a gorilla. This is a mistake. Donald is a bill-collecting gorilla,
